headline: Eversource Gains From Grid Modernization & Infrastructure Development
summary: ES gains from grid upgrades and major infrastructure investments, but regulatory risks and third-party reliance can weigh on performance.

headline: TD Cowen Initiates Coverage On FirstEnergy with Hold Rating, Announces Price Target of $56
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Shelby Tucker   initiates coverage on FirstEnergy (NYSE:FE) with a Hold rating and announces Price Target of $56.
